acceptance_criteria: Multi-cell edit with pricing preservation and autosave proof on the live Orders document route.

assertions.label: Document paste batches to one onChange per paste
assertions.expected: Pasted spreadsheet edits trigger one document writeback after paste completes.
assertions.observed: OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid.test.tsx now verifies paste-driven cell changes buffer during paste and call onChange once on paste end.

assertions.label: Invalid pasted numeric values are rejected before grid writeback
assertions.expected: Rejected values never land in the document model before validation runs.
assertions.observed: OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid.test.tsx now verifies negative unitPrice paste is rejected before writeback and surfaces the validation message.

assertions.label: Large live spreadsheet edit autosave round-trip remains unproven
assertions.expected: A deployed build records the edit, preserves recalculation, and confirms the autosave loop completes cleanly after a bulk spreadsheet edit.
assertions.observed: The repo behavior is hardened and unit-tested, but no fresh deployed-build probe yet captures the autosave round-trip after a large multi-cell edit.

limitation_detail.reason: The original limitation wording was inaccurate because document writeback no longer fans out one onChange per pasted cell. The remaining gap is specifically the missing live autosave round-trip proof on a deployed build.
limitation_detail.code_readiness: Paste batching, invalid numeric rejection, and structured rejection toasts are implemented and tested locally.
limitation_detail.follow_up_needed: Run one narrow staging probe on a deployed build after merge to confirm save-state behavior after a large multi-cell edit.
